race.comment: GOLD ENIGMA (5) missed by 0.4L on the Scarpside at Pinjarra last time out when jumping the race favourite. The slight rise in trip here should suit, as will the easier company she takes on. Been on the cusp of a maiden win for a while and this presents as a golden opportunity. KODY'S BELLE (9) comes back in distance today following a 4.5L defeat at Pinjarra last time out. Despite her recent defeats, that form looks to shape nicely for a race of this calibre. Drawn inside here and she can play a leading role once again. SAUCISSON (3) was knocking on the door before a disappointing performance at this track most recently. He's better than he showed that day and he can bounce back to form as he jumps up in distance. Drawn ideally and can return to form. INFRASTRUCTURE (1) comes here off a 77-day break, though he did go right to 2200m on debut. Creates interest. GOLD BEAU (2) has claims off a solid last start performance.
